creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Wolfram Schneider from comment #0)
My assumption was always that as long as (for instance) 14.0 is still supported,
we would still accept bug reports for someone whose installation was done off
one of the 14.0-STABLE snapshots.

Similar for 13.3-STABLE.

Is this not correct?

Cc:ing re@ .
